senses.gloss: evening, time between sunset and night

examples.text: يَا أَبَا ذَر: مَا مِن صَبَاحٍ وَلَا رَوَاحٍ إِلَّا وَبِقَاع الَارْضِ يُنَادِي بَعْضَهَا بَعْضَا
examples.english: Oh Abu Dharr! No morning or evening pass without every corner on earth calling one another. (part of a Hadith)

examples.text: وَلِسُلَيْمَـٰنَ ٱلرِّيحَ غُدُوُّهَا شَهْرٌۭ وَرَوَاحُهَا شَهْرٌۭ ۖ
examples.english: And to Solomon ˹We subjected˺ the wind: its morning stride was a month’s journey and so was its evening stride.
